end,{},function(k,y)local a=g(y)local u=function(u)return v(k,{u},y,a)end return u end,function(k,y)local a=g(y)local u=function(u,e,O,f,B)return v(k,{u;e,O,f,B},y,a)end return u return(l(6521502-(-975485),{}))(a(B))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[y(-232988-(-279009))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
